name: Golden Potato Scones with Parmesan and Pancetta
recipeIngredient: 4 slices pancetta or smoked streaky bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Heat a frying pan and dry fry pancetta or bacon in batches for 5-6 minutes until crispy. Remove with a slotted spoon and let cool on kitchen paper.
3. In a large mixing bowl, sieve flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Rub the butter into the flour mixture until it resembles breadcrumbs.
5. Add potato, Parmesan, oregano, and cooled pancetta or bacon pieces; mix well.
6. Stir in enough milk to form a soft but firm dough.
7. Turn out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead briefly.
8. Roll out the dough to 3/4 inch thickness and cut into rounds using a 2-1/2-inch fluted cutter, re-rolling and cutting as needed for about 10 scones.
9. Place on a greased baking sheet. Brush tops with beaten egg.
10. Bake for 15 minutes until well risen and golden brown. Cool slightly on a wire rack before serving warm with butter.
